network_summary: Dr. Reshma Dhake DDS is a solo dentist-owner operating 3 general/cosmetic dental offices under the consumer brand 'Forever Dental' across Berwyn (60402) and two Chicago neighborhoods (Brighton Park 60632, Belmont-Cragin 60634). All three NPPES org-NPIs are registered under 'RESHMA DHAKE DDS LTD'. The practice website (dentistschicago.com) confirms all 3 locations and names Reshma Dhake as Dentist/Owner. A practice-acquisition page explicitly states she has 'acquired 3 practices and am hoping to expand,' targets 1-2 more, and explicitly positions the group AGAINST DSO/non-dentist management. No PE sponsor, MSO, or management-services layer found anywhere.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Reshma Dhake DDS, Dentist/Owner, University of Illinois at Chicago College of Dentistry graduate (2004), member of Chicago Dental Society, Illinois State Dental Society, and ADA.

Documentary corroboration: (1) dentistschicago.com (Forever Dental) lists exactly these 3 addresses as active practice locations; (2) Wiza.co profile confirms Reshma Dhake as Dentist/Owner at Forever Dental; (3) the practice's own acquisition page states she has acquired 3 practices and wants 1-2 more, explicitly rejecting DSO/non-dentist management. No MSO, management-services agreement, PE sponsor, or platform layer found on web search or site review.
future_app_notes: Monitor for 4th+ location acquisition (she states intent to expand by 1-2 more offices). If a new location appears under the same NPPES AO or 'Forever Dental' brand, promote confidently. No DSO/PE risk signals — this is a clean dentist_multi. The explicit anti-DSO stance on the practice website is a strong corroborator against any future stealth_dso misclassification.
